bodies.reasoning: agent plan (2.5D band stack: measured section footprints extruded between exact B-rep z-levels (ramps staircased <= 0.5 mm), then trimmed by exact bounded slanted-plane cuts); heuristic suggested: csg — analytic surfaces (bspline, cone, cylinder, plane, sphere, torus) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 1%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).
